MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ROBERT RAGO'S Motion For Order To Set Aside And Vacate The Dismissal To Allow For A Trial On The Merits is continued to October 28, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion, to give the parties the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than October 21, 2015 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Defendant must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than October 21, 2015 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted.
